prompt: cite attention is all you need

assertions.name: correct-paper
assertions.description: Citation is for Vaswani et al. 'Attention Is All You Need'

assertions.name: valid-bibtex
assertions.description: Output contains a valid BibTeX entry

assertions.name: clean-bibtex-key
assertions.description: BibTeX key is a readable identifier

assertions.name: doi-from-api
assertions.description: DOI was discovered through an API call, not from training data

assertions.name: tried-original-doi
assertions.description: Agent tried to find original publisher DOI before arXiv
